text:
Itwas a Red Stripe Paris Olympics takeover when 10 winners from the global beer brand’s #GuhFiGoldAndGlory promo played tourist in Paris with Red Stripe chaperones, two lucky reps from distribution partner Celebration Brands Limited, a wholesale owner, and two Red Stripe staffers!

From the Eiffel Tower to the Louvre, French eateries, and cheering on #TeamJamaica in Stade de France, Friday Social shares some of the memories created by Red Stripe Brand Manager Nathan Nelms and the #GuhFiGoldAndGlory squad in Paris.











HOUSE RULES
title: #SuhWiDweetRed Stripe Paris Olympics - Jamaica Observer
